name: DMX Hoist RGB Orb_Cube_Tube
comment: DMX Hoist RGB Orb/Cube/Tube: Mod Scenes DMX Hoists provide a unique element that is fully controllable via standard DMX controllers.  These hoists allow for a large range of variable speed movement to serve your most detailed design concept.  Each fixture contains RGB LEDs allowing for a wide range of color and flexibility.

gwSpecs.description: Mod Scenes DMX Hoists provide a unique element that is fully controllable via standard DMX controllers.  These hoists allow for a large range of variable speed movement to serve your most detailed design concept.  Each fixture contains RGB LEDs allowing for a wide range of color and flexibility.
